title: 背を追ってくれるから

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Silence Suzuka shows up to practice
with someone at her side.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, Trainer. Spe was wondering if she could train
with me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm shadowing Suzuka to discover the
secret of her running technique!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So, if it's okay, I'd like to join today's training
session! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really?! Yes! Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, are you really that excited?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow Suzuka, that was awesome! You were all, fwoosh!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: W-was I really?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oops! Sorry! Maybe I'm not explaining it well
enough...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, it's okay. It was very like you. Fwoosh, right? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's go for another run. Are you still up
for it, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Of course I am!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Come on, Spe. I can still keep—
choice_data_list: You two realize it's already nighttime, right?
You two realize it's already nighttime, right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Wh-when did it...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer. Can we run one last drill?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
One last sprint down a stretch, or maybe one
counterclockwise lap around the track. Just one is
enough, so please!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Understood.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right, Spe. Let's give this last one our all.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, you wanna go all out?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Now I'm feeling the rush! I won't let you pull away
this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the two begin their serious match.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... Huff... Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Special Week desperately fights to
keep up, in the end, Silence Suzuka comes out
the winner.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... I... I knew you were strong, but... there's just no way I can compete...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's not true, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I felt your presence behind me the entire time. I
couldn't shake you off at all.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You ran with all your might and pushed me to the
limit too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems training with Special Week has been a
good experience for Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm super excited I get to see your amazing
runaway style from this close up!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're making too big a deal of it. Let's
enjoy our last bit of training for the day.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Phew. Thank you for everything today!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I should be thanking you. By the way, Spe, were
you able to discover the secret of my running
technique?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Secret?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, right! I was so absorbed in running with
you, I completely forgot!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Oh, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I guess that means we have to do this again
another time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Please! Invite me to train anytime!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And I really mean anytime! Even if I'm in class!
Even if I'm eating!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! But I don't want to get in your way. You
probably want to run on your own...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to worry, Spe. If I want to run
alone, I'll run alone.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we're roommates, aren't we? After all
this time, I couldn't turn you down now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-that makes me so happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems her relationship with Special Week is
having a good effect on Silence Suzuka.
